title: piper regnellii var. pallescens
intro: Piper regnellii var. pallescens, also known as the paler Regnell's pepper plant, is a variety of Piper regnellii, a species of flowering plant in the pepper family (Piperaceae). This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, including its analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Piper regnellii var. pallescens include relief from pain, reduced inflammation, and improved digestive health. The plant is typically prepared as an infusion or tincture, and can be used in herbal remedies to support overall well-being.
